chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D53of 2022: Riaz Ahmed &Others Vs. P.O Sindh & others For the Petitioners: Mr. Ashiq Illahi N. SundraniAdvocate Date of hearing: 23.02.2022 Date of announcement: 23.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Granted Granted subject to all just exceptions (3&4) Thepresent petition is filed on the apprehension that appointments to be undertaken by the respondents vide advertisement dated 26.05.2021 would not be done in accordance with law. Admittedly, the process has not been completed and there is no impugned order or action. Theentire premise of the petitioners is based on conjunctures and surmises, which could not be sustained by this court. In view hereof, the present petition is find to be misconceived, hence, dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
